description_long: This is a large-format, professional-grade printer with a robust, rectangular body primarily finished in matte black. The front features a wide feed slot for media, flanked by two solid side panels, and a ribbed cylindrical roller beneath the slot for feeding paper or vinyl. On the top right, there is a prominent control panel with a digital display and several tactile buttons, providing user interface and operational controls. The rear side is mostly enclosed, with visible ports and ventilation grilles, suggesting connectivity and cooling functions. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a mix of plastic and metal components, and the design is optimized for high-volume or specialized printing tasks. The object is suitable for placement in urban environments such as print shops, offices, or service centers.
description: A robust, matte black large-format printer with a wide feed slot, ribbed roller, and a digital control panel on the top right. Its solid, rectangular build is designed for professional or commercial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide feed slot, ribbed roller, and the digital control panel on the top right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the side panel and the angled placement of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the mostly enclosed back, with visible ports and ventilation grilles.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the solid side panel and the control panel's position.
attribute_brand_logo: A small brand logo is visible on the top left of the front panel, white in color, rectangular in shape, and positioned above the feed slot.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located on the top right, rectangular in shape, featuring a digital display and several tactile buttons arranged in a grid layout.
attribute_power_cable_placement: A power port is visible on the lower right side of the rear panel; no cable is attached in the images.
